title: SDM Market
description: Allows you to create a trading platform for players
body:
The **SDM Market** introduces a fully functional trading platform for Minecraft servers, allowing players to seamlessly buy and sell items with one another. Through an intuitive interface, players can list their items, set custom prices, and explore the marketplace to find deals from other players in real-time.

The mod is highly configurable, providing server administrators with extensive control over the marketplace. Admins can dictate which items are eligible for trading and establish fixed prices for certain items. The flexibility of the configuration ensures that each server can have its own unique economy, tailored to the specific gameplay and community.

Key Features:
- Player-Driven Marketplace: Players can list items for sale, browse available goods, and complete transactions securely within the platform.
- Customizable Item Listings: Administrators have the power to define which items can be traded and manage the availability of items in the market.
- Price Control: Set fixed prices for items or allow players to determine their own prices when listing items for sale.
- Secure Trading: All exchanges are managed within the mod to ensure item integrity and prevent duplication or loss during transactions.

This mod is ideal for servers looking to implement a player-driven economy with customizable item trading options, providing flexibility for both administrators and players.
